prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 91.5 kg; Height 173.5 cm; BMI 30.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 121/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.9%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 167mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 201mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 93.2kg; 9 months ago 90.3kg; 6 months ago 90.7kg; 3 months ago 90.3kg; current 91.5kg), Height (12 months ago 173.5cm; 9 months ago 173.5cm; 6 months ago 173.5cm; 3 months ago 173.5cm; current 173.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 121mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 64mmHg; 9 months ago 65mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 66mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 62mg/g; 9 months ago 45mg/g; 6 months ago 57mg/g; 3 months ago 59mg/g; current 53mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 123mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 16.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.2g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 15.0g/dL; current 15.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
